title: The Biggest GDP Trading Myth (That's Costing You Money in 2026)
description: Everyone trades the GDP candle. That's exactly why they lose. Here's what smart money actually does during high-impact news — and how the R2F Trading system reads order blocks and fair value gaps to catch the real move AFTER the manipulation. Stop guessing. Start trading structure.
script: Everyone trades the GDP candle. That's the trap. MYTH: trade the spike. Catch the move. Get paid. Wrong. Smart money uses that spike to hunt YOUR stop losses. Over 70% of GDP spikes reverse within 15 minutes. That's not a trade — that's a trap. TRUTH: wait for the sweep. Then find the order block left behind. The fair value gap printed AFTER the GDP spike — that's your real entry. Every time. Stop trading news blindly. Trade structure. Follow R2F Trading for daily setups.
